construction.panels: Color-block construction with main body panels, set-in sleeves featuring a contrasting vertical panel along the outer arm, and a two-panel hood with a contrasting top panel.
construction.seams: Standard stitched seams, tonal to the fabric color.
construction.closures: Not visible from the back, but typically a full-zip front closure for a bomber jacket. Elasticated cuffs and hem provide closure.
construction.details: Two-panel hood with a visible channel for a drawstring (drawstring not visible). Elasticated cuffs and hem, giving a gathered, ribbed appearance. No pockets visible from the back.

graphics.content: Script text 'Love Hurts' with a heart wrapped in thorns above and to the right.
graphics.size: approximately 12 inches wide x 10 inches tall
graphics.style: The 'Love Hurts' text appears to be thick, raised chenille or dimensional embroidery in deep red with a white outline. The heart is a deep red patch or tackle-twill, outlined with white embroidery. The thorns are embroidered in a metallic gold/tan color, appearing raised.

branding.primary_logo: Small circular patch with a stylized 'S' or rose/leaf design in light green on a dark green background.
branding.logo_location: Left cuff, near the elasticated hem.
branding.secondary_marks: None visible other than the main 'Love Hurts' graphic which is central to the collection's theme.

fabric_appearance: Smooth, lightweight woven fabric with a subtle satin sheen and slight crinkle texture, characteristic of nylon or polyester windbreaker/bomber material.
unique_features: The prominent 'Love Hurts' graphic with the thorny heart on the back is the signature feature. The color-blocked hood and sleeve panels add a distinctive design element.
collection_aesthetic: This piece embodies Oakland luxury streetwear through its relaxed fit and premium fabric appearance. The 'Love Hurts' graphic with the thorny heart conveys emotional expression, blending a sense of 'dark luxury' with a bold, statement-making design, characteristic of the SkyyRose brand.
